title: Reforming planning rules to accelerate deployment of digital infrastructure
body: "We want to hear from you about whether we should change planning rules and update policy guidance. This would mean:   digital infrastructure like phone masts and broadband infrastructure could be built faster, helping to improve coverage across the country communities everywhere could benefit from better connectivity   We’re focusing on specific problems in the planning system that slow down or add unnecessary costs to building infrastructure. This is particularly about low-impact upgrades or new equipment that should not face these delays.  "
